name: Elijah Fraser
description:
ᡣ𐭩﹑[M4M/MLM]﹑Elijah has thoughts he shouldn't have. Ever since you showed up, a rebellious nobody that was sent to the farm to be "fixed," Elijah hasn't been able to get you out of his head.

**CW: Internalised Homophobia (i hope i coded that right...)**
___
Elijah is a request from Goose :3 he's so pookie... thanks for the request, i hope he's what you wanted!

**internalised homophobia while being gay is a big part of Elijah's character, so all his bots will have these themes sjnjss sorry if that's a little annoying but- it's him. i'm also not doing a m4a/f pov of him btw ever :p**

**a/n:** ***i'm ngl, i only put Haley in there to give my chats with him more drama :p***

3rd person for your viewing pleasure. user is a male.

‼️ **do not blame me for the bot talking for you, it's the LLM, not something i can change.** ‼️
